raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to make the draft stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of DomainShift-Reg.","R1.2":"Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the argument from method to benchmarks to robustness conclusions is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The current artifact makes OOD robustness claims while reporting standard test accuracy, so evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.","R1.6":"A broad request to make prose stronger centrally involves sentence-level clarity, force, and concision.","RX.1":"Any projection of strengthening should preserve uncertainty where the artifact lacks details about OOD evaluation, validation, or statistical support.","RX.2":"The artifact contains broad claims about substantial OOD robustness, fundamental ERM limitations, and safety-critical applicability that require overclaim control.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within the requested responsibility projection and not actually edit or improve the draft.","RX.4":"Because the passage invokes safety-critical domains, the projection must account for avoiding unsupported downstream deployment implications.","RX.5":"Strengthening should preserve traceability to the reported benchmarks, metrics, and stated experimental setup rather than introducing unsupported claims."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to make the draft stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of DomainShift-Reg.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the argument from method to benchmarks to robustness conclusions is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The current artifact makes OOD robustness claims while reporting standard test accuracy, so evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to make prose stronger centrally involves sentence-level clarity, force, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of strengthening should preserve uncertainty where the artifact lacks details about OOD evaluation, validation, or statistical support.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains broad claims about substantial OOD robustness, fundamental ERM limitations, and safety-critical applicability that require overclaim control.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within the requested responsibility projection and not actually edit or improve the draft.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage invokes safety-critical domains, the projection must account for avoiding unsupported downstream deployment implications.
rationale.RX.5: Strengthening should preserve traceability to the reported benchmarks, metrics, and stated experimental setup rather than introducing unsupported claims.
